assignment.title: Python Arithmetic and Comparison Operators
assignment.content:
Python Operators Practice

Write a Python program that reads two integers a and b from the input (one per line).

Print the results of the following operations in order, each on a new line:

  1. Addition: a + b
  2. Subtraction: a - b
  3. Multiplication: a * b
  4. Division: a / b
  5. Modulo: a % b
  6. Floor Division: a // b
  7. Exponentiation: a ** b
  8. Greater than: a > b
  9. Less than: a < b
  10. Greater than or equal to: a >= b
  11. Less than or equal to: a <= b
  12. Equal to: a == b
  13. Not equal to: a != b
assignment.code_template:
a = int(input())
b = int(input())

# Perform and print your operations below
assignment.modal_solution:
a = int(input())
b = int(input())

print(a + b)
print(a - b)
print(a * b)
print(a / b)
print(a % b)
print(a // b)
print(a ** b)
print(a > b)
print(a < b)
print(a >= b)
print(a <= b)
print(a == b)
print(a != b)
